FreeType is dual-licensed under:

  - the FreeType License (FTL), a BSD-style license -- see FTL.TXT; and
  - the GNU General Public License v2 -- see GPLv2.TXT.

A user of FreeType may choose either. MeshLib uses and redistributes FreeType
under the FTL. Both license texts are included here because the FTL asks that
its credit notice be preserved and the project ships both texts.
